channel.title: AMZN — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on AMZN (Amazon) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Andreas Halvorsen: NEW POSITION AMZN (+100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Andreas Halvorsen (Viking Global Investors) new position AMZN in Q4 2025 · 1.9% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Andreas Halvorsen)
